identity.name: Kaizer News ePaper
identity.target_audience: Telugu & English news readers in Telangana/Hyderabad

styles.masthead: font-english_heading font-black text-4xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight uppercase
styles.headline_hero: font-telugu_heading font-bold text-2xl md:text-4xl leading-tight text-ink
styles.headline_standard: font-telugu_heading font-bold text-lg md:text-xl leading-snug text-ink
styles.caption: font-ui_elements text-xs text-ink/60 uppercase tracking-wider

sections.masthead: w-full border-b-2 border-black py-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#fcfbf9]/95 backdrop-blur-sm
sections.page_strip: hidden md:flex flex-col w-24 border-r border-stone-300 h-[calc(100vh-100px)] overflow-y-auto sticky top-[100px]

ArticleCard.style: group relative flex flex-col gap-3 p-4 hover:bg-stone-100/50 transition-colors border-b border-stone-200 last:border-0

elements.image: aspect-video w-full object-cover grayscale-[20%] group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500
elements.category_tag: text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-kaizer_orange mb-1

Masthead.instructions: Must include Kaizer News logo in Blackletter style. Date on left, Edition on right. Bottom border must be double line (border-double border-b-4).

PageThumbnail.style: w-full aspect-[3/4] bg-stone-200 mb-4 cursor-pointer hover:ring-2 ring-kaizer_orange transition-all opacity-70 hover:opacity-100 aria-selected:opacity-100 aria-selected:ring-2

visual_enhancers.texture: before:content-[''] before:fixed before:inset-0 before:bg-[url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/cream-paper.png')] before:opacity-30 before:pointer-events-none before:z-[-1]

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for English headings and 'Noto Serif Telugu' for Telugu content.
The background MUST NOT be pure white (#FFFFFF). Use #fcfbf9 to mimic paper.
Implement a 'Masonry' or 'Bento' style grid for the main news content. It should NOT look like a standard blog list.
The sidebar strip (Page 1, Page 2...) is critical for the 'ePaper' feel.
Use Shadcn 'Calendar' for the date picker but style it to look like a vintage calendar.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Download, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Calendar, Moon, Sun).
Ensure text-justify is used for body content to mimic newspaper columns.
Add a 'PDF Download' button in the Masthead.
Create the file in /app/frontend/src/pages/EPaperReader.js and update App.js to route it.

universal_guidelines.dark_mode_strategy: In dark mode, do NOT use pure black. Use #1c1917 (Stone 950) for background and #e5e5e5 (Stone 200) for text. Invert borders to #44403c.
universal_guidelines.interaction: Add hover effects to article cards: slight background darkening (in light mode) and title color change to Orange.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio between text and paper background is > 4.5:1.
